data.title: Kalon Capital Announces Its Launch as a Mid-Ticket Equipment Finance Platform Backed by Bender Equity
data.description: Nicole Torraco, a seasoned industry professional, has been named the CEO of Kalon Capital LLC. The company, based in Stamford, Connecticut, was officially launched on April 13, 2026. Kalon Capital LLC is focused on providing mid-ticket equipment finance services to end-users, vendors, and OEMs throughout the United States. The launch is sponsored by Bender Equity, a private investment firm.

data.title: Possibility of $0.70 breakout in 14 days, as 0G nears $0.59 resistance with flatlining momentum. RSI at 58%. Buyers cautious.
data.description: The current price of 0G is approaching the Bollinger Band resistance level at $0.59, with momentum showing a flatline at zero. The RSI is at 58%, indicating that there are buyers in the market, but they are exercising caution. There is a possibility that the price could surpass the $0.65 resistance level in the near future.

data.title: YunoJuno Named as Highest Leader in Everest Group PEAK Matrix® for Freelancer Engagement and Management Systems (FEMS) Assessment 2026
data.description: YunoJuno, a prominent freelancer and contractor management system, has been recognized by independent research firm Everest Group as the top Leader in the FEMS category, earning the 'star performer' designation. This recognition was announced in New York and London on April 13, 2026.

data.title: Cav Achieves FedRAMP High Authorization to Streamline Adoption of Continuous Cyber Assurance for U.S. Federal Agencies and High-Reliability Organizations
data.description: Cav, a prominent cyber assurance company, has recently obtained the coveted Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program® (FedRAMP) High Authorization. This achievement allows Cav to provide the Department of Defense and various federal and civilian entities with a more efficient procurement process for NIST 800-53-based continuous compliance. This certification opens up opportunities for the company to cater to government agencies and Fortune 500 enterprises, ensuring enhanced cybersecurity measures.

data.title: Jack and Jill of America, Incorporated, Brings Literacy, Service, and Lasting Impact to North Charleston During 2026 Biennial National Youth Trip
data.description: In an event held in Washington on April 13, 2026, Jack and Jill of America, Incorporated, a prominent African American family organization, initiated a community service program aimed at promoting literacy, cultural understanding, and leaving a lasting impact for local children and families. This project was designed to provide essential resources and support to the community.

data.title: Fastenal Admits Tariffs Are Rising Faster Than They Can Raise Prices
data.description: Fastenal Company (NASDAQ: FAST) surpassed revenue projections in its Q1 report, with net sales reaching $2.20 billion, a 12.4% increase from the previous year, slightly surpassing the estimated $2.199 billion. GAAP diluted earnings per share stood at 30 cents, rising from 26 cents and aligning with forecasts. Net income experienced a 13.8% boost to $339.8 million. Operating income saw a 13.6% rise to $447.6 million, leading to a margin expansion to 20.3% from 20.1% due to operational leverage and cost control. However, gross margin shrank to 44.6% from 45.1% because of adverse pricing and cost trends, compounded by higher transportation expenses, rebate challenges, and changes in customer composition that impacted margins. Yet, these drawbacks were somewhat mitigated by advantages from the company's fastener expansion initiative. SG&A improved to 24.3% of sales from 25.0%. Although the stock faced downward pressure following the report, Full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global Central Venous Catheter Market Set for Steady Growth as Chronic Disease Burden and Critical Care Demand Rise | Future Market Insights
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, a recent market analysis by Future Market Insights reveals that the worldwide central venous catheter market is experiencing continuous growth. This growth is fueled by the escalating occurrence of chronic diseases and a growing need for extended intravenous treatments. Key statistics indicate a significant upsurge in market demand, highlighting the importance of central venous catheters in modern healthcare. The report projects a promising outlook for the market in the coming years, showcasing its crucial role in meeting the medical needs of a rapidly expanding patient population globally.

data.title: Five UBS Financial Advisors in Arizona named to Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-In-State
data.description: Five financial advisors located in Arizona have been recognized on the Forbes 2026 Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-In-State list, distinguishing them for their outstanding performance in the financial advisory sector.
